mapper.select: SELECT F.festival_id, F.description, F.start_date, F.end_date, F.status, P.place_id, P.place_type, P.name, P.address, P.view_count, P.latitude, P.longitude, P.image_url, P.created_at FROM FESTIVAL F LEFT JOIN PLACE P ON F.festival_id = P.place_id WHERE F.festival_id = #{festival_id}
SELECT ticket_id, festival_id, ticket_type, price, stock, description FROM FESTIVAL_TICKET WHERE festival_id = #{festival_id}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FESTIVAL F LEFT JOIN PLACE P ON F.festival_id = P.place_id
(P.Name LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR P.ADDRESS LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR F.DESCRIPTION LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%')
AND F.status IN
#{item}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PLACE ( place_id, place_type, name, address, latitude, longitude, image_url ) VALUES ( SEQ_PLACE.NEXTVAL, 'FEST', #{name}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{image_url} )
INSERT INTO FESTIVAL ( festival_id, description, start_date, end_date ) VALUES ( SEQ_PLACE.CURRVAL, #{description, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{start_date}, #{end_date} )

INSERT INTO FESTIVAL_TICKET ( ticket_id, festival_id, ticket_type, price, stock, description ) VALUES ( SEQ_TICKET.NEXTVAL, SEQ_PLACE.CURRVAL, #{ticket_type}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{description, jdbcType=CLOB} )
